languages.text: "Закрывшись в лаборатории, я пытался найти способы обернуть воздействие артефакта вспять. Ни один из них не сработал. Я обратился к ксеносу, требуя от него информации — угрожал, просил, умолял. Но тот лишь презрительно молчал. Я был абсолютно беспомощен. И тогда я решился на побег".

"Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."
languages.original_text: "Закрывшись в лаборатории, я пытался найти способы обернуть воздействие артефакта вспять. Ни один из них не сработал. Я обратился к ксеносу, требуя от него информации — угрожал, просил, умолял. Но тот лишь презрительно молчал. Я был абсолютно беспомощен. И тогда я решился на побег".

traits.locale_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

"Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

"Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

"Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

languages.text: «Encerrado en el laboratorio, busqué el modo de invertir los efectos del artefacto. Ninguno funcionó. Recurrí al xenos, exigiendo información mediante amenazas, peticiones y ruegos, pero su única respuesta fue un silencio despectivo. Me sentía impotente. Fue entonces cuando hui».
languages.original_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

traits.locale_text: «Encerrado en el laboratorio, busqué el modo de invertir los efectos del artefacto. Ninguno funcionó. Recurrí al xenos, exigiendo información mediante amenazas, peticiones y ruegos, pero su única respuesta fue un silencio despectivo. Me sentía impotente. Fue entonces cuando hui».

languages.text: “我把自己锁在实验室里，试图寻找逆转造物效果的方法。但所有方法都不管用。我转而向那个异形索要信息，我威胁、要求、恳求，可它回应我的只有轻蔑的沉默。我彻底束手无策了。于是，我决定逃离。”
languages.original_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

traits.locale_text: “我把自己锁在实验室里，试图寻找逆转造物效果的方法。但所有方法都不管用。我转而向那个异形索要信息，我威胁、要求、恳求，可它回应我的只有轻蔑的沉默。我彻底束手无策了。于是，我决定逃离。”

languages.text: « Je me suis cloîtré dans le laboratoire et j'ai essayé de trouver un moyen d'annuler les effets de l'artefact, en vain. Je me suis alors tourné vers le xénos, en tentant de lui soutirer des informations à l'aide de menaces, de requêtes et même de suppliques, mais je n'ai eu pour réponse que le silence le plus condescendant qui soit. J'étais totalement impuissant. C'est alors que j'ai décidé de fuir. »
languages.original_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

traits.locale_text: « Je me suis cloîtré dans le laboratoire et j'ai essayé de trouver un moyen d'annuler les effets de l'artefact, en vain. Je me suis alors tourné vers le xénos, en tentant de lui soutirer des informations à l'aide de menaces, de requêtes et même de suppliques, mais je n'ai eu pour réponse que le silence le plus condescendant qui soit. J'étais totalement impuissant. C'est alors que j'ai décidé de fuir. »

languages.text: "Laboratuvara kapanıp eserin etkilerini tersine çevirmenin yollarını bulmaya çalıştım. Hiçbiri işe yaramadı. Zenoya döndüm; tehditle, ricayla, yalvar yakar hâlde bilgi talep ettim. Ancak tek tepkisi, küçümseyici bir sessizlikti. Çaresiz kalmıştım. Sonra da kaçıp gitmeye karar verdim."
languages.original_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

traits.locale_text: "Laboratuvara kapanıp eserin etkilerini tersine çevirmenin yollarını bulmaya çalıştım. Hiçbiri işe yaramadı. Zenoya döndüm; tehditle, ricayla, yalvar yakar hâlde bilgi talep ettim. Ancak tek tepkisi, küçümseyici bir sessizlikti. Çaresiz kalmıştım. Sonra da kaçıp gitmeye karar verdim."

languages.text: "Ich schloss mich in das Labor ein und suchte nach Wegen, die Effekte des Artefaktes umzukehren. Nichts davon hat funktioniert. Also wandte ich mich an den Xenos, verlangte Informationen ... ich habe ihm gedroht, ihn angefleht. Aber seine einzige Reaktion war eine herablassende Stille. Ich war völlig machtlos. Und dann beschloss ich, zu fliehen."
languages.original_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

traits.locale_text: "Ich schloss mich in das Labor ein und suchte nach Wegen, die Effekte des Artefaktes umzukehren. Nichts davon hat funktioniert. Also wandte ich mich an den Xenos, verlangte Informationen ... ich habe ihm gedroht, ihn angefleht. Aber seine einzige Reaktion war eine herablassende Stille. Ich war völlig machtlos. Und dann beschloss ich, zu fliehen."

languages.text: 「研究室に閉じこもり、私はそのアーティファクトの効果を覆す方法を探した。どれもうまくいかなかった。私は異種族に向き直り、脅し、要求し、懇願して情報を求めた。だが返ってきたのは、侮蔑的な沈黙だけだった。私はまったくの無力だった。そして私は、逃げることにした。」
languages.original_text: "Locked away in the laboratory, I tried to find ways to reverse the artefact's effects. None of them worked. I turned to the xenos, demanding information — with threats, requests, pleas. But its only response was contemptuous silence. I was utterly powerless. And then I decided to flee."

traits.locale_text: 「研究室に閉じこもり、私はそのアーティファクトの効果を覆す方法を探した。どれもうまくいかなかった。私は異種族に向き直り、脅し、要求し、懇願して情報を求めた。だが返ってきたのは、侮蔑的な沈黙だけだった。私はまったくの無力だった。そして私は、逃げることにした。」
